== Notes for [[Item:Q103216|Q103216]] ==


Shlomo ,

son of David and nn to: nn

1) Shemaiah to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Shlomo-ibn-Da-ud/6000000000795687204?through=6000000000795569798

Shlomo ,

son of David and nn to: nn

1) Shemaiah to: nn

Lutou contra os sírios sob as ordens dos etnarcas Macabeus (165-135 aC).

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000000795687204

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
